description: Default capability for the main window, detached log windows (log-*), detached terminal windows (term-*), native dialog windows (dlg-*) and the custom tray quick-control panel (tray-panel): core APIs, tray, dialogs, opener (incl. open_path for folders/log files and open_url for the panel's clickable port) and logging. Window manipulation (show/hide/focus/minimize/close) happens Rust-side only, so no core:window:allow-* permissions are granted to the webview; core:event (part of core:default) covers the dialog windows' own listeners.
